loading_tip_1: 开局优先攒金币，升级城堡比盲目造塔更稳。
loading_tip_2: 补给值绑定城堡等级，升级城堡可加快士兵恢复速度。
loading_tip_3: 破甲效果全局最高封顶 49%，无需堆叠过多破甲技能。
loading_tip_4: 重甲怪物惧怕魔法塔，轻甲敌人更易被弓箭塔克制。
loading_tip_5: 英雄每秒回血有上限，残血不要硬扛 BOSS 持续伤害。
loading_tip_6: 合理选择炮塔 5 级进化分支，适配你的英雄流派。
loading_tip_7: 士兵阵亡会扣除补给，控制战损才能维持人海战力。
loading_tip_8: 流派成型会有负面制衡，不要强行混搭三大流派。
loading_tip_9: 老虎机可以放逐废技能，避免技能槽被无效技能占用。
loading_tip_10: 无尽模式怪物增幅会逐步衰减，后期仍可稳步发育。
skill_desc_iron_guard: <color=#66ccff>减伤</color><color=#ffd700>5%</color><color=#ffffff>，</color><color=#66ccff>防御</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>6</color><color=#ffffff>，</color><color=#66ccff>魔抗</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>6</color><color=#ffffff>，</color><color=#66ccff>控制抗性</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>15%</color><color=#ffffff>（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_seismic_stomp: <color=#66ccff>对范围内敌人造成</color><color=#ffd700>70</color><color=#ffffff>点伤害</color><color=#66ccff>，半径</color><color=#ffd700>90</color><color=#ffffff>，冷却</color><color=#ffd700>9</color><color=#ffffff>秒（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_counter_attack: <color=#66ccff>反弹受到伤害的</color><color=#ffd700>15%</color><color=#ffffff>给攻击者</color><color=#ffffff>（反伤上限为</color><color=#ffd700>200%</color><color=#ffffff>物理攻击，随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_iron_frenzy: <color=#66ccff>将</color><color=#ffd700>6%</color><color=#ffffff>防御转化为攻击力，并获得</color><color=#ffd700>1%</color><color=#66ccff>减伤</color><color=#ffffff>（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_tactical_retreat: <color=#66ccff>在范围内持续</color><color=#ffd700>2</color><color=#ffffff>秒，为友军恢复</color><color=#ffd700>15%</color><color=#ffffff>生命</color><color=#66ccff>，半径</color><color=#ffd700>100</color><color=#ffffff>，冷却</color><color=#ffd700>12</color><color=#ffffff>秒（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_whirlwind: <color=#66ccff>对目标造成</color><color=#ffd700>80</color><color=#ffffff>点伤害，冷却</color><color=#ffd700>8</color><color=#ffffff>秒（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_sky_slash: <color=#66ccff>对目标造成</color><color=#ffd700>120</color><color=#ffffff>点伤害</color><color=#66ccff>，距离</color><color=#ffd700>200</color><color=#ffffff>，冷却</color><color=#ffd700>5</color><color=#ffffff>秒（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_blade_storm: <color=#66ccff>召唤飞剑环绕英雄旋转，持续</color><color=#ffd700>5</color><color=#ffffff>秒</color><color=#66ccff>；每次命中造成</color><color=#ffd700>80%</color><color=#ffffff>物攻</color><color=#66ccff>伤害</color><color=#ffffff>（随等级提升，6级附带</color><color=#ffd700>10%</color><color=#66ccff>减速</color><color=#ffffff>）</color>
skill_desc_commander_aura: <color=#66ccff>范围内士兵</color><color=#66ccff>攻击</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>8%</color><color=#ffffff>，</color><color=#66ccff>防御</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>5%</color><color=#ffffff>，半径</color><color=#ffd700>150</color><color=#ffffff>（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_rallying_cry: <color=#66ccff>为友军提供</color><color=#66ccff>移速</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>18%</color><color=#ffffff>与</color><color=#66ccff>攻速</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>10%</color><color=#ffffff>，持续</color><color=#ffd700>3.5</color><color=#ffffff>秒，半径</color><color=#ffd700>140</color><color=#ffffff>，冷却</color><color=#ffd700>14</color><color=#ffffff>秒（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_supply_master: <color=#66ccff>补给恢复</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>15%</color><color=#ffffff>，</color><color=#66ccff>补给上限</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>10</color><color=#ffffff>（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_group_heal: <color=#66ccff>范围治疗</color><color=#ffd700>20%</color><color=#ffffff>生命</color><color=#66ccff>，半径</color><color=#ffd700>120</color><color=#ffffff>，冷却</color><color=#ffd700>10</color><color=#ffffff>秒（随等级提升）</color>
skill_desc_soldier_rush: <color=#66ccff>提升友军</color><color=#66ccff>移速</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>30%</color><color=#ffffff>与</color><color=#66ccff>攻速</color><color=#ffffff>+</color><color=#ffd700>15%</color><color=#ffffff>，持续</color><color=#ffd700>3</color><color=#ffffff>秒，冷却</color><color=#ffd700>15</color><color=#ffffff>秒（随等级提升）</color>
enemy_desc_wild_wolf: 狂暴野狼：高速近战单位，攻速快、身板脆
enemy_desc_corrosive_bat: 腐蚀蝙蝠：飞行单位，魔抗较高
enemy_desc_rotten_peasant: 腐烂流民：基础人海杂兵，刷新数量最多
boss_skill_desc_abyss_descend: 进场全屏震荡，对所有士兵、英雄造成高额范围伤害，小幅击退全场单位
boss_skill_desc_flame_shock: 释放大范围震荡伤害，造成高额物理伤害并小幅震退士兵
boss_skill_desc_nether_breath: 远程扇形法术AOE，附带5秒持续凋零掉血效果
boss_skill_desc_corrosive_shock: 释放范围毒素伤害，命中范围内所有单位降低20%移速，持续3秒
faction_desc_commander: 强化士兵、补给管理、团队增益
cfg_desc_skill_ui_config: 技能 UI 显示配置：图标、等级数字图、以及多语言 key 映射
slot_machine_jackpot_instant_max_skill: 立即获得一个满级技能
slot_machine_jackpot_random_max_upgrade: 随机将一个技能升至满级
upgrade_desc_arrow_tower_ballista: 重弩破甲炮塔：大幅单体伤害、破甲上限额外+5%（仍不超49%）、克制精英BOSS
upgrade_desc_arrow_tower_multishot: 连弩速射炮塔：攻速再提升、连锁弹射、清杂兵能力翻倍
upgrade_desc_magic_tower_arcane: 奥术减防塔：大范围常驻魔防削减，适配法师兵团、法系英雄流派
upgrade_desc_magic_tower_inferno: 炼狱灼烧塔：灼烧伤害倍率提升、持续压制回血
